name: field
title: Field
description: Form-field wrapper (Field) and group wrapper (FieldGroup) providing label, hint, required indicator, and a polite live-region error with icon + text — all wired to the control via the Field context (id, aria-describedby, aria-invalid, required, disabled).
useWhen: Wrapping a single form control that needs a label, hint, or validation error
Marking a control required with both a visible and screen-reader indicator
Announcing validation errors to screen readers as they appear (live region)
Grouping checkboxes or radios under one question (FieldGroup fieldset + legend)
avoidWhen: The control already has its own composite labeling (e.g. a search input inside a labelled search landmark)
Static, non-form content — use headings and paragraphs instead
A single checkbox with its own inline label and no hint or error (plain label is enough)

keyboard: The wrapper adds no keyboard behavior of its own; the wrapped control keeps its native contract
Tab moves focus to the wrapped control; clicking the label focuses it (native htmlFor association)
A disabled Field (or FieldGroup via the native fieldset attribute) removes its control(s) from the tab order
Within a FieldGroup, each checkbox or radio keeps its native Tab/Space/Arrow behavior
accessibility.targetSize: not applicable (non-interactive wrapper; wrapped controls meet the 44px project default)
